title: Ab Initio Molecular Dynamics (Car-Parrinello / BOMD) Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: m_I * d^2R_I/dt^2 = -grad_I E_DFT[R];  Car-Parrinello: mu*d^2 phi_i/dt^2 = -dE/dphi_i* + constraints
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Ab Initio Molecular Dynamics (Car-Parrinello / BOMD)

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=130) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class CPMD, CP2K, VASP-MD; Nose-Hoover / Parrinello-Rahman provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
